lane.title: 03 Delivery Aggregator
lane.last_task: Guide Zomato Biryani Rice ₹30 item discount setup
lane.last_summary: Screenshot verified Zomato web offers page only exposes Promo Code and Freebies and explicitly says fixed/percentage/BOGO offers require the Zomato Restaurant Partner Android app. Guidance: do not use web promo code because it is not SKU-specific; use Android app item/fixed dish discount for Biryani Rice only.
lane.next_action: Owner to open Zomato Restaurant Partner Android app and create a ₹30 fixed item discount on Biryani Rice only, then verify preview before saving.
lane.mutation_status: Guidance only; no Zomato/POS/Odoo mutation executed by Codex.

recent_events.task: Guide Zomato Biryani Rice ₹30 item discount setup
recent_events.summary: Screenshot verified Zomato web offers page only exposes Promo Code and Freebies and explicitly says fixed/percentage/BOGO offers require the Zomato Restaurant Partner Android app. Guidance: do not use web promo code because it is not SKU-specific; use Android app item/fixed dish discount for Biryani Rice only.
recent_events.next_action: Owner to open Zomato Restaurant Partner Android app and create a ₹30 fixed item discount on Biryani Rice only, then verify preview before saving.
recent_events.mutation_status: Guidance only; no Zomato/POS/Odoo mutation executed by Codex.

recent_events.task: Aggregator-specific Biryani Rice SKU portal discount config
recent_events.summary: Analysed saved Swiggy/Zomato owner-app offer grammar and HE aggregator playbook. Recommended Zomato native Percentage Dish Discount on Biryani Rice SKU only; Swiggy selected-item flat/percent discount only if available, otherwise no cart-wide discount. No portal mutation executed.
recent_events.next_action: Owner to configure Biryani Rice SKU-only discount in partner portals, verify only one SKU is selected, disable stacking/auto-renewal, and monitor first 60 minutes for clearance volume.
recent_events.mutation_status: Recommendation only; no Swiggy/Zomato/POS/Odoo/WABA mutation executed by Codex.

recent_events.task: Narrow Biryani Rice clearance recommendation to single SKU only
recent_events.summary: Owner clarified the offer must be only around the Biryani Rice SKU. Revised recommendation: item-level Biryani Rice SKU ad/discount only; no combo-led offer, no cart-wide discount, no other promoted SKUs.
recent_events.next_action: Owner to configure Swiggy/Zomato ads against only the Biryani Rice SKU and stop manually once excess rice clears.
recent_events.mutation_status: Recommendation only; no platform, POS, Odoo, WABA, or ad portal mutation executed by Codex.

recent_events.task: Biryani Rice same-day clearance offer recommendation
recent_events.summary: Analysed HE delivery/dine-in aggregator playbooks and current delivery intelligence. Recommendation only: use a short-window item-level Swiggy/Zomato ad for Biryani Rice + Chicken Kabab or rice bowl, not a broad menu discount; keep restaurant-funded discount within margin guardrail and stop once excess rice clears.
recent_events.next_action: Owner to run manual item-level ads on Swiggy/Zomato and monitor first 60-90 minutes for orders, CAC, and stock clearance; avoid blanket discounts and auto-renewal.
recent_events.mutation_status: Ad/POS/portal recommendation only; no platform, POS, Odoo, or WABA mutation executed by Codex.

recent_events.task: Finalize 3 AM Claude WABA aggregator owner report execution
recent_events.summary: Executed and verified the 3 AM aggregator owner-report pipeline. Cloudflare cron now triggers daily_owner_report only during 03:00-03:14 IST; aggregator-pulse pulls Swiggy/Zomato, runs Ring 3 events, resolves latest Claude via Anthropic Models API, stores HE/NCH reports in D1, and sends approved WABA summaries to Nihaf. Template aggregator_daily_owner_report_v1 is APPROVED. Rotated production ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from latest local .hn-assets.env key and refreshed Pages runtime. Manual proof for 2026-05-25 sent both reports successfully using claude-opus-4-7; health endpoint remained ok.
recent_events.next_action: Let the next 3 AM IST cron run automatically after outlet close; then add UI rendering for stored daily-owner-report rows inside /ops/he/aggregator/ and /ops/nch/aggregator/ so the full Claude markdown is visible from the dashboards.
recent_events.mutation_status: HN Cloudflare/D1/WABA owner-report send only; no Swiggy/Zomato portal, POS, Odoo, ad, price, offer, or menu mutation.

recent_events.task: Execute 3 AM Claude WABA aggregator owner reports
recent_events.summary: Built and deployed daily_owner_report pipeline: Cloudflare cron trigger in aggregator-health-watcher, aggregator-pulse Claude analysis, D1 report storage, WABA template guard, and report readback. Meta template aggregator_daily_owner_report_v1 is APPROVED. Rotated production ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from local latest key, forced GitHub-backed Pages refresh, verified model claude-opus-4-7. Manual proof for 2026-05-25 sent both HE and NCH WABA reports to Nihaf with provider message IDs.
recent_events.next_action: Let the 3 AM IST cron run automatically after outlet close; then add UI rendering for stored daily-owner-report rows inside /ops/he/aggregator/ and /ops/nch/aggregator/.
recent_events.mutation_status: HN Cloudflare/D1/WABA owner-report send only; no Swiggy/Zomato portal, POS, Odoo, ad, price, offer, or menu mutation.

recent_events.task: Create WABA template for 3 AM aggregator reports
recent_events.summary: Added locked comms endpoint to submit/check aggregator_daily_owner_report_v1. Submitted HE-accessible WABA Utility template successfully; Meta status is PENDING, id 839936862064050. Initial draft was rejected for variable ratio and corrected. NCH WABA template-management attempt failed because current token lacks permission on NCH WABA id, so owner reports should use the accessible HE/HN WABA unless NCH token is fixed.
recent_events.next_action: After Meta approves template, wire 3 AM IST owner report cron: pull last 24h orders/events, use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for concise COA analysis, send two WABA messages to Nihaf with HE and NCH summaries plus dashboard links. Add status guard so pending/rejected template does not silently fail.
recent_events.mutation_status: Meta WABA template submission only via HN comms endpoint; no customer sends, no portal/POS/Odoo/ad/price/offer mutation.

recent_events.task: Ring 3 aggregator events
recent_events.summary: Ring 3 deployed live: coa_ring3_analyze and coa-events, D1 event/candidate schema, cron analysis. Proof 2026-05-25: 9 orders, 12 events, 16 candidates, 2 critical, loss 1165.10, all candidates data_gathering.
recent_events.next_action: Expose coa-events in owner UI by brand/platform with critical loss, rejects/cancels, discount exposure, and gated item candidates. Keep price/offer blocked until margin proof.
recent_events.mutation_status: HN D1 intelligence only; no portal/POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/price/offer mutation.

recent_events.task: Execute COA Ring 3 aggregator event intelligence
recent_events.summary: Deployed Ring 3 event layer for aggregator control: coa_ring3_analyze and coa-events live, event/candidate D1 schema active, health-watcher cron now runs Ring2 pull then Ring3 analysis. Manual proof for 2026-05-25 scanned 9 orders, upserted 12 events, 16 item-level candidates, 2 critical events, estimated loss 1165.10; all price/offer candidates gated as data_gathering.
recent_events.next_action: Build owner UI panels over coa-events: critical events, rejected/cancelled loss, discount exposure, and proof-gated item candidates by HE/NCH and Swiggy/Zomato. Keep offer/price execution blocked until margin proof.
recent_events.mutation_status: HN Cloudflare Pages/D1 intelligence mutation only; no Swiggy/Zomato portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA send, price, or offer mutation.

recent_events.task: Execute COA Ring 2 aggregator action layer
recent_events.summary: Deployed Ring 2 direct-pull action layer to hnhotels.in. Added D1 action ledger/attempt/coordinate-health schema, /api/aggregator-pulse POST type=coa_ring2_pull, GET action=coa-actions, direct Swiggy/Zomato cURL replay from Cloudflare Pages secrets, session/coordinate health transitions, WABA failure-alert hook with notify=true, and health endpoint using Ring 2 direct-pull freshness. Loaded current Swiggy and Zomato cURL artifacts as Cloudflare production secrets. Wired existing aggregator-health-watcher 5-minute cron to run Ring 2 pull before health checks. Verified cron-triggered run agg-ring2-1779696059689-shdh1p status ok: 8 attempts, 6 ok/empty, 14 orders seen/upserted; owner-orders for 2026-05-25 returns 9 unique orders, 6 delivered, 1 active, 1 rejected, 1 cancelled, delivered revenue 1808.01. Health endpoint now status ok with direct pull age about 1 minute.
recent_events.next_action: Ring 3: event/intelligence layer for missed/rejected/cancelled/order-ready issues, price/offer candidate gates, dashboard controls for session refresh, and Zomato order-detail enrichment capture. Keep price/offer portal actions blocked until margin proof.
recent_events.mutation_status: HN Cloudflare Pages/API, D1 order/action/health rows, Cloudflare Pages secrets, and existing Cloudflare cron wiring only; no Swiggy/Zomato portal mutation, no POS/Odoo mutation, no ad mutation, no price/offer change, no WABA send during verification.

recent_events.task: Execute COA Ring 1 aggregator entity foundation
recent_events.summary: Deployed aggregator COA Ring 1 to hnhotels.in: D1 closed entity schema/seeds plus /api/aggregator-pulse?action=coa-entities. Verified live seed_version 2026-05-25-ring1-v1 with 2 brands, 2 outlets, 2 platforms, 4 platform outlets, 4 pull sources, 8 valid platform-outlet-source coordinates, 7 health states, 7 issue codes, 2 session slots. Existing health endpoint still works and correctly reports ingest stale/down.
recent_events.next_action: Ring 2: implement scheduled pull actions over the 8 valid coordinates, session health transitions, owner WABA expiry/failure alert wiring, and dashboard consumption without any price/offer/POS/Odoo mutation.
recent_events.mutation_status: HN dashboard/API and D1 foundation mutation only; no Swiggy/Zomato portal mutation, no POS/Odoo mutation, no price/offer change.

recent_events.task: Plan COA aggregator live architecture
recent_events.summary: Read COA doctrine page and mapped aggregator dashboard/live-ingest into COA rings. Planned architecture from Entity ring (Brand, Outlet, Platform, PartnerSession, PullRequest, PartnerOrder, OrderLine, OfferExposure, HealthState) to Action ring (refresh session, poll current, backfill history, normalize, reconcile, alert, owner decision) to Event ring (session expired, order missed/rejected, offer anomaly, revenue-control opportunity). Current state remains template approved and CTO cURL replay valid, but live scheduled ingest/alert loop still needs implementation.
recent_events.next_action: Implement aggregator COA foundation: D1 session/pull/health tables, direct poller cron/manual refresh API, WABA alert wiring, and dashboard freshness controls before any price/offer mutation.
recent_events.mutation_status: architecture planning only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA send, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.task: Verify WABA approval and aggregator live status
recent_events.summary: Verified Meta template aggregator_session_expired_alert_v1 is APPROVED. Verified no deployed end-to-end failure alert wiring exists yet for aggregator session expiry. Live aggregator health endpoint reports status down with Swiggy/Zomato snapshots stale since 2026-05-24 and order rows stale by hours. Direct CTO cURL replay still works in dry-run for Swiggy and Zomato, but it is not running as scheduled ingest.
recent_events.next_action: Wire approved WABA template into aggregator health failure detection and scheduled direct API ingest; then verify by non-sending dry-run, controlled test alert, and live dashboard freshness.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only verification only; no WhatsApp send, no partner portal/POS/Odoo/ad/price/offer mutation

recent_events.task: Create WABA aggregator session alert template
recent_events.summary: Submitted WhatsApp Business utility template aggregator_session_expired_alert_v1 through existing HN Meta/WABA template API. Meta accepted template id 1250650277143457 with status PENDING, category UTILITY, rejected_reason NONE. Template alerts when a Swiggy/Zomato session for HE/NCH is failing and asks owner to refresh partner API cURL session.
recent_events.next_action: Poll template until APPROVED; after approval wire aggregator health failure detection to send this template to Nihaf when direct API replay returns 401/403 or stale-session state.
recent_events.mutation_status: WABA template creation mutation only; no message sends, no partner portal/POS/Odoo/ad/price/offer mutation

recent_events.task: Define expired aggregator session UX
recent_events.summary: Defined safest UX for Swiggy/Zomato direct API session expiry: cron detects 401/403 or bad status, marks platform session expired, dashboard keeps last good data visible with stale badge, owner gets a refresh action to paste/upload fresh cURL, backend validates replay before replacing stored token/cookie/CSRF, then cron resumes automatically.
recent_events.next_action: Implement session health model and refresh-cURL admin panel for HE/NCH aggregator dashboards before relying on fully automated direct API polling.
recent_events.mutation_status: UX/architecture guidance only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.task: Clarify aggregator OTP/password auth strategy
recent_events.summary: Explained that direct frontend API polling removes DOM/extension scraping but does not remove partner authentication. Recommended verifying whether Swiggy/Zomato partner logins support password login, but not building OTP bypass. Best architecture remains manual/authorized session refresh after OTP, storing only session material securely with expiry health and direct API polling afterward.
recent_events.next_action: Create a safe session-refresh flow for CTO cURL method: paste fresh Swiggy/Zomato cURL after login, validate replay, store token/cookie/CSRF securely, show expiry/health, then Cloudflare/Mac cron polls direct APIs.
recent_events.mutation_status: architecture/auth guidance only; no partner portal login automation, no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/price/offer mutation

recent_events.task: Analyze CTO direct frontend API files
recent_events.summary: Deep-inspected /Users/nihaf/Downloads Swiggy/Zomato cURL and response files plus local direct partner puller. Confirmed CTO method is direct frontend API replay, not DOM scraping: Swiggy fetchOrders uses RMS API with access token and both outlet IDs; Zomato get-all-v2 uses merchant gateway API with cookie/CSRF headers. Dry-run replay currently returns HTTP 200 for both. Swiggy file is current/live fetch, not full historical; Zomato orders file is single rich detail payload, separate from history list.
recent_events.next_action: Build Cloudflare/Mac scheduled direct API updater with stored session material, pagination, health, and manual session-refresh path; capture Zomato detail endpoint if full per-order discount enrichment is required.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only file/API analysis and dry-run replay only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.task: Explain live updater host dependency
recent_events.summary: Verified aggregator-pulse health live. Current live API reports order rows updated today but platform snapshots are stale since 2026-05-24, so the always-on extension polling path is not currently healthy. Explained that current/manual cURL/script updates run from the machine executing them; background live updates require a logged-in Chrome appliance on laptop or win PC, and stop when that machine/browser is off unless moved to an always-on host.
recent_events.next_action: Set up one always-on aggregator appliance, preferably win PC or dedicated Mac LaunchAgent/Chrome extension, with health visible on HE/NCH dashboards and no dependency on manual cURL.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only health check and architecture explanation only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.task: Live update architecture inspection
recent_events.summary: Inspected HN Aggregator Pulse extension, aggregator-pulse API, HE Swiggy auto-push, HE assembly API, and HE POS bridge read-only control plane. Found existing aggregator extension already keeps Swiggy/Zomato tabs warm, captures cookies/Swiggy Accesstoken, polls APIs every 5 min, queues data to hnhotels.in/api/aggregator-pulse, and API upserts idempotently. KDS/POS bridge pattern is browser-appliance plus cloud heartbeat/command/snapshot; assembly API is separate write path and must not be reused for analytics ingestion.
recent_events.next_action: Implement read-only live updater: extend Aggregator Pulse service worker or Mac runner to poll Zomato get-all-v2 and Swiggy history/fetchOrders for both HE/NCH, add per-platform health/last-success UI, and keep POS/KDS write endpoints isolated.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only code/config inspection only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.task: Separated Swiggy/Zomato dashboard UI
recent_events.summary: Redesigned HE/NCH aggregator dashboards to separate Swiggy and Zomato clearly. Added first-screen platform control lanes with Zomato customer/offer lens and Swiggy ops/fee lens; each lane shows orders, delivered revenue, AOV, exceptions, offer proof, top items, and needs-control rows. Updated revenue control and data coverage copy to reflect May 1-25 coverage for both platforms. Deployed cache-busted assets to /ops/he/aggregator/ and /ops/nch/aggregator/ and verified live HTML/JS contain platformBoard and v2 asset URLs.
recent_events.next_action: Use separated lanes to build exception/revenue action queue for price positioning and offer placement; keep mutation blocked until margin proof is mapped.
recent_events.mutation_status: dashboard UI deploy only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation
